text: A certain technological eeriness fills me as I stand here. The dimness, the harsh blue and purple light, and the emptiness of the room beyond the glass all amplify the feeling that I am on the threshold of unknown creation. The 'R+D' wall only reinforces this sense—this is a place devoted to possibility, experimentation, and perhaps a little isolation. I feel curious but a little out of place, both inspired and unsettled by the stark modernity around me.
